steps.title: Use the confirmation clue
steps.content: The first sentence says Duchamp intended Fountain to challenge ideas about art. The second says the work "did just that," so the transition should emphasize that the intention was realized.

steps.title: Pick the confirming transition
steps.content: B would compare two similar examples, but there is only one work. C signals contrast, which conflicts with "did just that." D adds a separate point rather than confirming the first sentence. The answer is A.
